architecture.inputs: event temporal context plus cached hand/gaze/pose sensor vector
architecture.conditioning: one learned query per completion component
architecture.outputs: component-specific correctness, outcome, and onset evidence
architecture.action_isolation: the new branch is included in the frozen-action event parameter set

success_gate.primary: incorrect-event recall above zero at no more than 2 false alerts per minute
secondary: no material action F1@50 regression from 16.73

limitation: This is not the full image-ROI experiment. The downloaded raw RGB tree was absent from Ubuntu when the experiment was launched, so the pilot uses the hand/gaze/pose stream already preserved in the strict-causal cache.
